positive: Stylized vector illustration of a friendly celestial creature, resembling a fusion of a fox and a comet tail, floating against a deep twilight gradient background. The creature has vibrant, iridescent fur and leaves a luminous, sparkling trail. It is surrounded by stylized geometric constellations and small, glowing motes of dust. The composition is centered, ensuring strong visual impact for apparel printing. High contrast, graphic novel aesthetic, minimal shading, clean lines, kawaii cyberpunk feel, Pantone jewel tones: deep sapphire, emerald green, electric violet, and gold accents. Studio lighting, flat graphic design style, perfect for screen printing.
negative: low resolution, blurry, text, signature, watermark, logo, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, noisy, photorealistic, gradient sky background
